summary: User reported generic 'Xatolik yuz berdi' on order placement. Root causes addressed: improved Telegram initData validation (manual parse + rawurldecode), ensureUserExists before orders (FK fix), taxi_rides auto-migration, try/catch on place_order/taxi_order with real error messages, client post/get parses JSON errors and shows server messages, submitOrder/submitTaxi require initData and call saveUser first.
current_status: Order/taxi submission fixes ready locally. User must deploy auth.php, api.php, db.php, webapp/app.js v2.6 to server. If error persists, toast will now show exact reason (auth, DB, products).
